name: Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam
title: Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam
desc: "Come night or day, may the moonlight connect us."

skills.desc:
Attach Cost Reduction to 1 random card in your Hand and the top card in your Deck.
(You must have at least 2 Nod-Krai characters in your deck to add this card to your Deck.)
